summary: Excellent audience recording of a stellar show
review: The lone review rates this performance a full five stars, calling it an "excellent show" and noting that it is the best audience (AUD) source currently archived. No specific technical comments are provided, but the high rating implies both the music and the crowd‑recorded sound are well‑received.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review indicates very strong positive sentiment for both performance and recording, but the brief comment provides limited detail for a robust assessment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit technical comments; rating suggests acceptable clarity for an audience tape.
